mapper.sql: id, resource_id, user_code, sandbox_type, endpoint, sandbox_id, chat_id, status, auto_release, lease_policy, timeout_seconds, remote_expires_at, last_renew_at, next_renew_at, last_access_time, release_time, release_reason, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ss_sandbox_record ( resource_id, user_code, sandbox_type, endpoint, sandbox_id, chat_id, status, auto_release, lease_policy, timeout_seconds, remote_expires_at, last_renew_at, next_renew_at, last_access_time, release_time, release_reason, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sandboxType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sandboxId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chatId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{autoRelease,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{leasePolicy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timeoutSeconds,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remoteExpiresAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{nextRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastAccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{releaseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{releaseReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE user_code = #{userCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 'RUNNING' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET status = 'RELEASED', release_reason = COALESCE(NULLIF(release_reason, ''), #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), release_time = #{releaseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{releaseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'RELEASING')

UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET status = 'RELEASED', release_reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, release_time = #{releaseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{releaseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'RELEASED'

UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET status = 'RUNNING', sandbox_id = #{sandboxId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, endpoint = #{endpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remote_expires_at = #{remoteExpiresAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_renew_at = #{lastRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, next_renew_at = #{nextRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_access_time = #{lastAccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{lastAccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'STARTING'

UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET status = 'FAILED', release_reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status IN ('STARTING', 'RUNNING', 'RELEASING')
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND auto_release = 1 AND last_access_time IS NOT NULL
AND last_access_time < (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - #{timeoutMinutes} * INTERVAL '1' MINUTE)

SELECT FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND auto_release = 1 AND last_access_time IS NOT NULL
AND last_access_time < (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - #{timeoutMinutes} * INTERVAL '1' MINUTE)
AND (last_access_time > #{cursorTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} OR (last_access_time = #{cursorTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND id > #{cursorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}))
ORDER BY last_access_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND (lease_policy IN ('REMOTE_AUTO_EXPIRE', 'MANUAL') OR auto_release = 0) AND sandbox_id IS NOT NULL AND sandbox_id != '' AND timeout_seconds IS NOT NULL AND timeout_seconds > 0 AND next_renew_at IS NOT NULL AND next_renew_at <= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status != 'RELEASED' AND sandbox_id IS NOT NULL AND sandbox_id != ''
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET remote_expires_at = #{remoteExpiresAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_renew_at = #{lastRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, next_renew_at = #{nextRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{lastRenewAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET status = 'RELEASING', release_reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET auto_release = #{autoRelease,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lease_policy = CASE WHEN #{autoRelease,jdbcType=INTEGER} = 1 THEN 'REMOTE_AUTO_EXPIRE' ELSE 'MANUAL' END, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
